description.en: edgeX is a 24/7 decentralized trading layer for global assets, offering perpetuals across commodities, equities, and crypto, alongside spot markets. Powered by its own EDGE Chain, edgeX is designed to deliver capital-efficient, self-custodied and 24/7 trading for users globally. Backed by Circle and integrated with native USDC, edgeX is building next-generation trading infrastructure that connects global liquidity with onchain settlement across multiple asset classes.
